# Social Identity

Social identity links the self to groups, communities, and shared categories. It is central to projects on polarization, public health, belonging, and cooperation.

## Current focus

- Common ingroup identity
- Identity salience
- Group boundaries
- Intergroup attitudes
- Shared identity as an intervention pathway

## Links to projects

- [Polarization interventions](../projects/polarization-interventions.qmd)
- [Open questions](../open-questions.qmd)
